dashboard.description: Main Arena: Live scores, leaderboards, and match schedule.

squad.description: Squad Hub: Referrals, multipliers, and team growth.

history.description: Performance History: Past predictions and analytical breakdowns.

changelog.description: Nexus Evolution: System updates and version history.

list_matches.purpose: Fetch real-time match data, IDs, and statuses.

global_leaderboard.purpose: Audit the top performers across the entire Nexus ecosystem.

session_leaderboard.purpose: Analyze competition for a specific match session.

user_multiplier.purpose: Check live points boost and active referral counts.

score_analysis.purpose: Deep-dive into how points were calculated for a prediction.

prediction_history.purpose: Retrieve full historical performance for the current user.
